stemHtml:
A historical single-engine aeroplane which has a left-hand rotating propeller (ANTI-CLOCKWISE from the pilot's perspective) is on final approach, when the pilot decides to perform a go-around, applying full THRUST and a large PITCH-UP. Which of the following would occur?

1. The torque generates a roll to the right
2. Gyroscopic precession generates a yaw to the right
3. Propeller slipstream generates a yaw to the right
4. The asymmetric blade effect generates a yaw to the left
